Three-Layer Resource Management

Source: R/resource.R
resource.Rd

Manages large tool output to prevent context bloat.

  • Layer 1 (utils.R): Per-tool character truncation via truncate_tool_result(). Already applied at tool execution time.

  • Layer 2 (this file): Disk persistence for very large results. Content > 5 KB is saved to ~/.codeagent/tool-results/; a preview + file path is injected into the conversation instead.

  • Layer 3 (this file): ContentReplacementState – global budget tracker that replaces the largest old tool results across turns when total context exceeds a soft ceiling.

Developed by Kaiping Yang.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
